contactPageInfo: Get in touch with Lester Cerioli.
jobTitles: Founder | CEO | Solutions Architect | Senior Software Engineer
experienceSummary: With over 25 years of experience in software development, Lester Cerioli is a versatile and innovative professional in the technology sector. He currently leads Lucas Technology Services, the company he founded and where he serves as CEO, driving cutting-edge projects in various technology areas.
servicesIntro: As founder and CEO, Lester oversees the development of advanced technological solutions, including:
medicalAppsDesc: Development of innovative solutions for the health sector, focused on optimizing medical records and automating workflows, improving the experience for professionals and patients.
outsourcingDesc: Offering outsourcing services aimed at reducing operational costs, accessing specialized expertise, and focusing on clients' core business.
blockchainSolutionsDesc: Specialization in software development for Bitcoin and Blockchain, including smart contracts, DApps, NFTs, digital wallets, and cryptocurrency payment integrations.
techSkillsIntro: Lester has extensive experience in various technologies and programming languages, such as:
blockchainSkillsDetail: Development of decentralized solutions, smart contracts, and integration of financial systems based on cryptocurrencies.
